ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fee */,
  "current_fee" TEXT /* Current fee structure */,
  "requested_fee" TEXT /* Requested new fee structure */,
  "fee_type" INTEGER /* Type of fee (e.g., Application, Appeal) */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Estimated annual revenue from the fee */,
  "fund" INTEGER /* Fund to which the revenue is allocated */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* The date when the current fee structure becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* The date when the current fee structure expires */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* The last date and time the fee was modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* The user who last modified the fee */,
  "fee_category" INTEGER /* A reference to the fee category */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* A detailed description of the fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_fee_type FOREIGN KEY ("fee_type") REFERENCES fee_types ("fee_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_fee_category FOREIGN KEY ("fee_category") REFERENCES fee_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_fund FOREIGN KEY ("fund") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fee_types" (
  "fee_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee type */,
  "fee_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fee type (e.g., Application, Appeal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the fee type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the fund */,
  "budget" REAL /* The annual budget allocated to the fund */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* The name of the person responsible for the fund */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* The email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fee associated with the application */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* The name of the project for which the application is submitted */,
  "project_address" TEXT /* The address of the project */,
  "project_value" REAL /* The estimated value of the project */,
  "application_type" INTEGER /* A reference to the application type */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* The date the application was reviewed */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* The user who reviewed the application */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_fee_id FOREIGN KEY ("fee_id") REFERENCES fees ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_application_type FOREIGN KEY ("application_type") REFERENCES application_types ("application_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_applicant_name FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_name") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "appeals" (
  "appeal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appeal */,
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fee associated with the appeal */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant */,
  "appeal_date" TEXT /* Date the appeal was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the appeal */,
  "appeal_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the appeal */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* The date the appeal was reviewed */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* The user who reviewed the appeal */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the appeal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appeal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appeals_applicant_name FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_name") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appeals_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appeals_fee_id FOREIGN KEY ("fee_id") REFERENCES fees ("fee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., applicant, reviewer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date and time the user logged into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fee_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the fee category */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the fee category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_types" (
  "application_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application type */,
  "application_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the application type */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the application type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_type_id")
)
